channel.title: ships.fyi
channel.description: Every giant of the sea, at true scale. Long-form maritime writing, sourced and dated.

item.title: The six days that stopped world trade
item.description: In March 2021 one ordinary container ship turned sideways in the Suez Canal — and showed exactly how thin the arteries of the world economy are.

item.title: Why the biggest ships stopped growing
item.description: For fifty years ships doubled and doubled again. Then the curve went flat. The reasons are carved into canals, ports — and one graveyard of half-million-tonne tankers.
